ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the conflict is taking place */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory involved in the conflict */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the conflict started */,
  "intensity_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intensity level of the conflict */,
  "type_of_conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of conflict */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* First reported start date of the conflict */,
  "start_date_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the start date (e.g., day, month, year) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conflict (e.g., active, inactive, resolved) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_intensity_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("intensity_level_id") REFERENCES intensity_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_type_of_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_of_conflict_id") REFERENCES conflict_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the conflict the party is on (e.g., A, B) */,
  "gwno" INTEGER /* Global-wrap number for the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., government, rebel group, militia) */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Leader of the party */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_parties" (
  "conflict_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a conflict and parties */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the conflict the party is on (e.g., A, B) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the party in the conflict (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the party joined the conflict */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the party left the conflict (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_parties_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "gwno_loc" INTEGER /* Global-wrap number for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the territory is situated */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the territory in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the conflict type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intensity_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intensity level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the intensity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intensity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, negotiator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the conflict data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alliances" (
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alliance */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "allied_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the allied party */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the alliance was formed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the alliance ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alliances_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alliances_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alliances_allied_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("allied_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., battle, negotiation, ceasefire) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territorial_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party making the claim */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory being claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., active, inactive, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territorial_claims_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territorial_claims_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territorial_claims_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ceasefires" (
  "ceasefire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ceasefire */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ceasefire started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ceasefire ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ceasefire (e.g., active, inactive, breached) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ceasefire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ceasefires_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "negotiations" (
  "negotiation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each negotiation */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the negotiation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the negotiation ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the negotiation (e.g., active, inactive, successful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("negotiation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_negotiations_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)
